The target customer is a US woman age 40 and above a cohort largely composed of generation X typically defined as those between 1965 1980 in younger baby boomers this places her in a unique and often demanding life stage She's frequently in her peak earning years possessing a higher disposal income than younger generations And she remains a pragmatic and discerning steward of her finances making key decisions for the entire household budget Her life is characterized by independence resourcefulness and a high level of education a Defining characteristic of this demographic is to role as a member of the sandwich generation She's often caught in the complex and emotionally taxing position of simultaneously raising her own children We're also caring for her aging parents. This dual responsibility creates immense pressure making the quest for a sustainable work-life balance a central priority She is not a passive consumer She's a research-driven analytical individual who values quality authenticity and transparency transparency above all else She's adept of technology primarily using established social media platforms like Facebook and Instagram for connection information gathering But she's often wary of and overwhelmed by the constant influx of new digital tools and trends
